description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a long-sleeved shirt with a prominent bow tie and a pair of fitted pants. He wears a rounded cap on his head and brown shoes on his feet, giving him a slightly formal yet approachable appearance. The shirt is buttoned up and fits closely to the torso, while the pants are straight-cut and reach down to the ankles. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and his facial features are neutral, with a clean-shaven look. The shoes are simple and sturdy, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The overall attire and accessories suggest a person who might be attending a semi-formal event or working in a service or entertainment role in an urban environment.
description: An adult male figure in a long-sleeved shirt with a bow tie, fitted pants, a cap, and brown shoes, standing with arms extended. The attire is semi-formal and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, bow tie, shirt details, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, nose, and the straight cut of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, and pants, with both arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, shirt, and shoes from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved collared shirt with a bow tie, fitted pants, and a rounded cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a cap
